use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH AN OVERACTIVE BLADDER WITH SYMPTOMS OF URINARY FREQUENCY, URGENCY, OR URGE INCONTINENCE
TREATMENT OF OVERACTIVE BLADDER BY APPLICATION OF OXYBUTYNIN CHLORIDE GEL TO SKIN
TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH AN OVERACTIVE BLADDER WITH SYMPTOMS OF URINARY FREQUENCY, URGENCY, OR URGE INCONTINENCE WITH A SINGLE UNIT DOSE OF 10% OXYBUTYNIN CHLORIDE GEL

indications.text:
GELNIQUE is a muscarinic antagonist indicated for the treatment of overactive bladder with
symptoms of urge urinary incontinence, urgency and frequency. [see Clinical Studies 14].

GELNIQUE is indicated for the treatment of overactive bladder with symptoms of urge
urinary incontinence, urgency, and frequency [see Clinical Studies 14].

GELNIQUE is a muscarinic antagonist indicated for the treatment of overactive bladder with
symptoms of urge urinary incontinence, urgency, and frequency [see Clinical Studies (14)].

symptoms of urge urinary incontinence, urgency and frequency [see Clinical Studies (14)].
